protocol: Adjudicator: Claude (Fable 5), zero-shot, in-context, blind to labels. Same rule prompt as llm_matcher.py. Router/blocker: tfidf_char over registry variants.

errors: Merck Group -> Merck & Co. (should be Merck KGaA)

residual_errors.note: ALL residual errors from the lexical router; 4 false accepts are all Merck&Co-vs-Merck-KGaA at score 1.0; 165 misses are zero-overlap tickers/acronyms/transliterations/former names below 0.10

round3_alias_router.rules: initialism (0.92) + single-token contraction (0.85), capped below auto-accept so rescues route to the LLM
round3_alias_router.rescued: 50 pairs moved into band, all true positives, 0 negatives
round3_alias_router.residual: 115 knowledge-only cases (transliterations, former names, broken initialisms like HSBC/AIG) — the embedding-router target
